darkDominance: Black and near-black tones must cover 85 to 90 percent of the image area. Use true black, charcoal black, black-brown, black-blue, and black-green as the dominant fields. Color is limited to small controlled accents only: thin lines, narrow highlights, tiny mineral marks, small petals, or a small architectural edge. No large pale regions, no bright sky, no white field, no beige field, no broad daylight illumination, no high-key exposure.
globalNegative: No text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no icons, no interface elements, no frames, no border, no watermark, no people, no faces, no animals, no vehicles, no aircraft, no buildings shaped like spaceships, no fantasy scenery, no science-fiction scenery, no neon glow, no cartoon rendering, no anime rendering, no extra objects outside the described scene.
